[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]]

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 49th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Metal Pig]] and followed by [[Yin Water Ox]]. In the context of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], resulting in a harmonious relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Hiwa]]). 
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Rat (壬子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: jinshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

==Years of Yang Water Rat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 52 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Water Rat]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 52|52 AD]]
* [[AD 112|112 AD]]
* [[172|172 AD]]
* [[232|232 AD]]
* [[292|292 AD]]
* [[352|352 AD]]
* [[412|412 AD]]
* [[472|472 AD]]
* [[532|532 AD]]
* [[592|592 AD]]
* [[652|652 AD]]
* [[712|712 AD]]
* [[772|772 AD]]
* [[832|832 AD]]
* [[892|892 AD]]
* [[952|952 AD]]
| 
* [[1012|1012 AD]]
* [[1072|1072 AD]]
* [[1132|1132 AD]]
* [[1192|1192 AD]]
* [[1252|1252 AD]]
* [[1312|1312 AD]]
* [[1372|1372 AD]]
* [[1432|1432 AD]]
* [[1492|1492 AD]]
* [[1552|1552 AD]]
* [[1612|1612 AD]]
* [[1672|1672 AD]]
* [[1732|1732 AD]]
* [[1792|1792 AD]]
* [[1852|1852 AD]]
* [[1912|1912 AD]]
* [[1972|1972 AD]]
| 
* [[2032 AD]]
* [[2092 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2152 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2212 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2272 AD]]
* [[2332 AD]]
* [[2392 AD]]
* [[2452 AD]]
* [[2512 AD]]
* [[2572 AD]]
* [[2632 AD]]
* [[2692 AD]]
* [[2752 AD]]
* [[2812 AD]]
* [[2872 AD]]
* [[2932 AD]]
* [[2992 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Water Rat==
Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in [[Yang Fire Horse]] years, many water disasters ([[water-related disaster]]) occur in [[Yang Water Rat]] years. In the late Edo period, [[Takizawa Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."

However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in [[1972|1972 AD]] (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second [[Baby boom|Baby Boom]], and there are no recorded instances from [[1852|1852 AD]] (Kaei 5) or [[1912|1912 AD]] (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.

==Days of Yang Water Rat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of [[November]] is designated as the [[Month]] of [[Yang Water Rat]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days==
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for [[Yang Water Rat]] is the 1st day of [[Hassen]].

==See Also==
* [[1852 AD#Birth]]
* [[1912 AD#Birth]]
* [[1972 AD#Birth]]

{{wikidata link|Q904972}}
[[Category:East Asian folk religion]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
